summary: Comprehensive testing of DERIS Revision #2 (backend reviews API + frontend changes). Backend: 14/14 pytest tests passed for POST/GET/PATCH /api/reviews including validation (rating 1-5), status transitions, 404 on missing id, 422 on invalid status. Frontend: All 10 revision items verified — logo-only marquee (no text labels), Designer CTA correctly placed AFTER marquee BEFORE Values, 10 AI-generated /generated/ PNGs load on all product cards, Products has exactly 4 filters [Semua, Jaket=5, Pakaian=3, Aksesoris=2], About uses foto-utama1 only (Unsplash community photo removed), Designer Download Mockup button present with toast 'Mockup berhasil diunduh!' shown, double-click on overlay-init opens inline-edit-text input with Escape exit, JoinStory POSTs to /api/reviews and shows success, approved reviews merge into ReviewsCarousel on Home alongside 6 static, all WA links use NEW number 6281213167737, theme toggle works, Portfolio Lightbox works, FAQ accordion works. Zero non-library console errors during navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: Designer downloadMockup uses html-to-image which throws CORS/SecurityErrors when trying to inline remote fonts (api.fontshare.com, fonts.googleapis.com). Despite the errors, the download proceeds (toast shows). Consider passing fontEmbedCSS:'' or filter to skip web font embedding for a cleaner console.
server.py: GET /api/reviews uses Literal[...]='approved' default — good. Consider adding rate limiting on POST /api/reviews to prevent spam.
ReviewsCarousel renders user review's photo via from API; if base64 is large this could bloat HTML. Consider lazy-loading or capping size on backend.
Footer phone display '081213167737' matches the new BRAND.whatsapp constant — phone display issue from iteration_2 is now fixed automatically.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test reviews via API for verification; cleaned up via mongo delete_many at end. Final DB review count: 0.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend reviews collection: schema is {id, name, org, rating(1-5), text, photo_data_url?, status, date, created_at}. ENUM status: pending|approved|rejected. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_reviews.py is reusable. Filter testids on Products page are lowercase: filter-semua/filter-jaket/filter-pakaian/filter-aksesoris. Designer testids: cat-jaket/cat-kemeja/cat-kaos, path-create/path-have, overlay-init (double-click to edit -> inline-edit-text appears, Escape/Enter/blur to exit), download-mockup-btn, send-design-btn. JoinStory: story-name/org/text/submit, star-1..5. Home: home-designer-cta, home-product-{slug}, value-card-0..3. ReviewsCarousel fetches /api/reviews?status=approved and merges before 6 static REVIEWS. WA number across all surfaces: 6281213167737 (NEW, was 6283123453430).
